consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scoreable FLS task performance. Given the fundamental uncertainty about task structure and the absence of clear start/end markers typical of formal FLS assessments, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete/non-scoreable.
